pricing: AVLT_FUNDAMENTAL/USD via RedStone push-based adapter, with USDT0 implicitly pegged to $1 (no quote feed).
notes: RedStone adapter wrapped as Chainlink AggregatorV3Interface. Two-layer proxy architecture (feed proxy + adapter proxy); adapter upgraded 4 times historically. Requires 3+ signer threshold. USDT0 depeg risk not covered by the oracle. Feed updates every ~5 minutes via push transactions.
